column1: # Nano Sweep 11 — Genome (layer-duplicate + untie) first probe (2026-04-22)
#   1. GenomeLinear modules construct and train without error
#   2. alpha schedule ramps correctly (0 early -> alpha_final late)
#   3. Final val_bpb is not catastrophically worse than baseline (within 0.05)
#   4. Possibly already better if untie adds useful capacity under the budget
# Baseline (alpha=0 always) should exactly reproduce CastedLinear behavior.
# 4 runs x 300 steps x ~45 min = ~3 hrs.
